content.scenarioHint: 在社交聚会中，对方提到自己最近参加了一次令人惊叹的户外活动，你想引导对方分享更多细节，特别是关于照片或具体经历。
expectedAnswers: That’s awesome! Did you take any photos?
Wow, really? What did it look like? Did you snap any pictures?
Sounds incredible! Do you have any pics you can show me?
No way! Were you able to capture the moment with your camera?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否成功引导对方分享更多关于活动的细节
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合日常英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了与场景相关的关键词如 'photos', 'pictures', 'capture' 等

content.scenarioHint: 在社交聚会中，对方提到他最近在公园看到了一只鹿，你想引导他分享更多细节，比如距离、行为或感受。
expectedAnswers: Wait, you saw a deer? How close was it?
That's amazing! Did the deer notice you?
Wow, really? Was it just standing there or did it move away?
Did you get a good look at it? What was it doing?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否成功引导对方分享更多关于鹿的细节
语言准确性：语法结构正确，时态和用词恰当
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常对话习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了'saw', 'deer', 'close', 'look', 'behavior'等场景关键词

content.speakerText: You said you collect vintage records—what’s the rarest one you’ve found?
content.speakerTextCn: 你说你收藏古董唱片，最稀有的是哪一张？
expectedAnswers: A 1969 pressing of Pink Floyd’s 'Dark Side of the Moon'—only 300 were made!
I found one by a local band from the '70s that no one’s ever heard of.
It’s a first edition of a Bob Dylan album with a misprint on the cover.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确指出具体物品（唱片名称、年份、特点）
是否提供稀有性或独特性细节（限量、错误、冷门）
是否使用自然口语节奏，避免书面化表达
